howItWorks.intro: This speaker wire gauge calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Signal Loss
rules.formula: Loss% = Wire Resistance / (Wire R + Speaker R) × 100
rules.explanation: Proportion of power lost in the wire versus delivered to speaker.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: Does wire gauge matter for speakers?
faq.a: Yes, thicker wire (lower gauge) reduces signal loss over long runs.
For runs over 50 feet with 8-ohm speakers, or 25+ feet with 4-ohm speakers.
